creator: A.Wacknitz@gmx.de
text:
I have a similar problem with my Blade 2500 when booting 7.2, 7.2- 
stable (June 2009) and 8.0-current.
The machine is equipped with an XVR-100. The only additional PCI card  
is a LSI SAS3041X-R.
OpenBSD-4.5 works fine.
Last message is "Jumping to kernel entry 0xc0078000".

Regards
Andreas
